prompt: A photorealistic portrait of an {argument name="man description" default="elderly Asian man with thin wire-rimmed glasses"} wearing a {argument name="man attire" default="black double-breasted suit with a white shirt and black tie"}. He has a gentle, warm smile and is standing closely next to a {argument name="animal" default="large fluffy marmot"}. The animal is standing upright, resting its front paws on a textured wooden log. The background features a {argument name="setting" default="rustic outdoor garden with blank wooden signs, a vintage lantern on a post, lush greenery, and small colorful flowers"}. The image features {argument name="lighting and style" default="soft natural lighting, high-quality photographic details, and a shallow depth of field creating a smooth bokeh effect in the background"}.
translatedPrompt: 一张写实风格的肖像照，主角是一位 {argument name="man description" default="戴着细金属框眼镜的亚裔老者"}，身穿 {argument name="man attire" default="黑色双排扣西装，内搭白色衬衫并系着黑色领带"}。他面带温和亲切的微笑，紧挨着一只 {argument name="animal" default="毛茸茸的大土拨鼠"} 站立。土拨鼠呈站立姿势，前爪搭在一根质感粗糙的木头上。背景是 {argument name="setting" default="一个充满乡村气息的户外花园，配有空白木牌、立柱上的复古灯笼、郁郁葱葱的绿植以及色彩鲜艳的小花"}。画面呈现出 {argument name="lighting and style" default="柔和的自然光效、高质量的摄影细节，以及营造出背景平滑虚化效果的浅景深"}。

breakdown.creativeCore: 老人与土拨鼠肖像：一张写实风格的肖像照，一位身穿西装的老人与一只大土拨鼠在乡村花园背景中合影。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: natural light, shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
